'''Nillik''' was the [[sensor master]] onboard the [[Grand Imperial Navy]] and former [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] starship ''[[Tobay]]''.

==Biography==
After the loss of signals from the [[Lady Luck/Legends|''Lady Luck'']] and the [[Teljkon Vagabond]], Nillik was attacked by his commanding officer, [[Gegak]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
